/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/acoustic_pedal.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o acoustic_pedal   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/portaudio/19.7.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/portaudio/19.7.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lportaudio -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework AudioUnit -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreServices -lportaudio -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework AudioUnit -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreServices
